name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-13
title: Test boilerplate duplicated: make_clean_repo / build_tmproot_clean copied across 6+ test files
description: The same temp-repo-builder function appears, with minor variations, in: test-BACKLOG-11-rabbit-config-skill.py (make_clean_repo), test-RABBIT-CAGE-22-stale-marker.py (make_build_repo), test-RABBIT-CAGE-BUG4.py (make_build_repo), test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG10-override.py (build_tmproot_clean), test-RABBIT-CAGE-21-plugin-change-alert.py (make_clean_repo), test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG14-conditional-priority.py (make_clean_repo), test-RABBIT-CAGE-BUG123.py (build_tmproot_clean), test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG7-visual-messages.py (build_tmproot). Each creates the same skeleton: temp dir + git init + .claude/features/policy/*.md + policy-header.json + copy of generate-claude-md.py + registry.json + CLAUDE.md. Extract a shared test helper module (e.g., test/_helpers.py) so changes to the skeleton happen in one place. Currently any spec change (e.g. new required policy file) requires updating 8 test files.
